OBJECTIVES_ATDM: First team to score limit wins
OBJECTIVES_BALL: Carry or throw the Satellite Drone into the Uplink to score.
OBJECTIVES_BALL_HINT: Get the Satellite Drone to the Uplink.
OBJECTIVES_BALL_SCORE: Carry or throw the Satellite Drone into the Uplink to score. First team to &&1 points wins.
OBJECTIVES_BOOT: Use enemy target to delay use of their exo powers.
OBJECTIVES_BOOT_HINT: Eliminate enemy players. Use enemy target to delay use of their exo powers.
OBJECTIVES_BOOT_SCORE: Gain points by eliminating enemy players.  First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_CONF: Recover Dog Tags to score for your team and deny enemy scores.
OBJECTIVES_CONF_HINT: Recover Dog Tags for the win.
OBJECTIVES_CONF_SCORE: Recover Dog Tags to score for your team and deny enemy score.  First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_CTF: Gain points by stealing the enemy flag and then touching your flag at your base.
OBJECTIVES_CTF_SCORE: Gain points by stealing the enemy flag and then touching your flag at your base. First team with &&1 captures wins the round.
OBJECTIVES_DD_ATTACKER: Destroy both targets by planting explosives at both A and B.
OBJECTIVES_DD_ATTACKER_SCORE: Destroy targets A and B by planting explosives at their location.  Prevent the explosives from being defused once they have been planted.
OBJECTIVES_DD_DEFENDER: Protect targets A and B from being destroyed.
OBJECTIVES_DD_DEFENDER_SCORE: Protect the targets from being destroyed. If explosives are planted at either location, defuse them before they explode.
OBJECTIVES_DM: Gain points by eliminating other players.
OBJECTIVES_DM_SCORE: Gain points by eliminating other players.  First player to &&1 points wins.
OBJECTIVES_DOM: Capture the flags and defend them.
OBJECTIVES_DOM_HINT: Capture the flags and defend them.
OBJECTIVES_DOM_SCORE: Capture and defend the flags.  First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_GRAB_FLAG: First to grab the flag wins!
OBJECTIVES_GRAB_FLAG_SCORE: First team to grab the enemy flag wins!
OBJECTIVES_GRND: Hold the Drop Zone for Team Points and Care Packages.
OBJECTIVES_GRND_SCORE: Hold the Drop Zone for Team Points and Care Packages.  First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_GTNW: Be the first team to capture the Nuclear Strike crate to win.
OBJECTIVES_GTNW_SCORE: Be the first team to capture the Nuclear Strike crate to win. First team to &&1 capture wins.
OBJECTIVES_GUN: Kill players with your weapon to advance to the next weapon. First to get a kill with each weapon wins.
OBJECTIVES_GUN_SCORE: Kill players with your weapon to advance to the next weapon. First to get a kill with each weapon wins.
OBJECTIVES_HORDE: Survive as long as you can.
OBJECTIVES_HORDE_SCORE: Survive as long as you can.
OBJECTIVES_HP_HINT: Hardpoint location will move after set amount of time.
OBJECTIVES_HP_SCORE: Capture the Hardpoint and hold it to score points. First team to &&1 points wins.
OBJECTIVES_INDOC: Pickup enemy dog tags to convert them to your team.
OBJECTIVES_INDOC_HINT: Try to convert as many players as possible.
OBJECTIVES_INDOC_SCORE: Score points by converting enemies to your team.
OBJECTIVES_INFECT: Eliminated Survivors become Infected.  Infect everyone, or survive the game to win.
OBJECTIVES_INFECT_SCORE: Eliminated Survivors become Infected.  Infect everyone, or survive the game to win.
OBJECTIVES_JUGG: It's everyone against the Juggernaut.  Kill the Juggernaut to become the new Juggernaut.
OBJECTIVES_JUGG_SCORE: Kill the Juggernaut to become the new Juggernaut.  First Juggernaut to &&1 kills wins.
OBJECTIVES_KOTH: Gain points by holding the headquarters.
OBJECTIVES_KOTH_SCORE: Gain points by holding the headquarters.  First team to &&1 points wins.
OBJECTIVES_KOTM_HINT: Console hack integrity does not reset, each hack attempt will take less time.
OBJECTIVES_KOTM_SCORE: Hack consoles and use the missile platforms to destroy the enemy base.
OBJECTIVES_OIC: Gain Ammo by eliminating enemies.  Highest score wins.
OBJECTIVES_OIC_SCORE: Gain Ammo by eliminating enemies.  Highest score wins.
OBJECTIVES_ONE_FLAG_ATTACKER: Gain points by stealing the enemy flag and then touching the beacon at your base.
OBJECTIVES_ONE_FLAG_ATTACKER_SCORE: Gain points by stealing the enemy flag and then touching the beacon at your base. First team with &&1 captures wins.
OBJECTIVES_ONE_FLAG_DEFENDER: Protect the flag from being captured.
OBJECTIVES_ONE_FLAG_DEFENDER_SCORE: Protect the flag from being captured. First team with &&1 captures wins.
OBJECTIVES_OVERTIME_CTF: Be the first team to grab the enemy flag to win.
OBJECTIVES_PFLAGS: Carry Flags to Domination Points to capture them.
OBJECTIVES_PFLAGS_HINT: Carry a Flag from one Domination Point to another to capture it.
OBJECTIVES_PFLAGS_SCORE: Control Domination Points to increase team score. First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_SD: Take turns destroying and defending A and B bomb sites.
OBJECTIVES_SD_ATTACKER: Destroy target A or B by planting explosives at the bomb site.
OBJECTIVES_SD_ATTACKER_SCORE: Destroy target A or B by planting explosives at the bomb site.  Prevent the explosives from being defused once they have been planted.  First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_SD_DEFENDER: Protect the targets from being destroyed.
OBJECTIVES_SD_DEFENDER_SCORE: Protect the targets from being destroyed. If explosives are planted at either location, defuse them before they explode. First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_SR: Take turns destroying and defending A and B bomb sites. Recover dog tags to allow or deny respawns.
OBJECTIVES_SR_SCORE: Take turns destroying and defending A and B bomb sites. Recover dog tags to allow or deny respawns. First team to &&1 points wins.
OBJECTIVES_TDEF: Capture and hold the flag for a team double scoring bonus.
OBJECTIVES_TDEF_ATTACKER_HINT: Capture flag for team x2 bonus.
OBJECTIVES_TDEF_DEFENDER_HINT: Defend flag for team x2 bonus.
OBJECTIVES_TDEF_SCORE: Capture and hold the flag for team double scoring bonus.  First team to &&1 wins.
OBJECTIVES_TJUGG: Defend your Juggernaut to become Juggernaut.
OBJECTIVES_TJUGG_SCORE: Defend your Juggernaut to become Juggernaut.  First team to &&1 points wins.
OBJECTIVES_TWAR_SCORE: Gain momentum by killing enemy players and capturing flags. Capture all the flags to win.
OBJECTIVES_WAR: Gain points by eliminating enemy players.
OBJECTIVES_WAR_SCORE: Gain points by eliminating enemy players.  First team to &&1 points wins.
